titles.title: Be the Lord of My Life

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A sky without a North Star A ship without an anchor Caught up in the current My heart is prone to wander All the roads I've taken Lead me back to nowhere You're the destination You're the way to get there You can have it all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Be the song I sing Be my guiding light Savior of my soul Be the Lord of my life Every step I take Always by my side I am yours, You are mine Be the Lord of my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Mercies never failing Forgiveness overflowing The beauty You're unveiling A love that just keeps growing This is all I want I surrender all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I wanna go where you go Wanna move where you move Wanna love who you love Watch it break on through

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Be the song I sing Be my guiding light Savior of my soul Be the Lord of my life Every step I take Always by my side I am yours, You are mine Be the Lord of my life I am yours, You are mine Be the Lord of my life I am yours, You are mine Be the Lord of my life
